reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 장난감 넘 귀여워요 사이즈도 적당해요
reviews.content_en: The toy is so cute! The size is just right too.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 뜯자마자 엄청 잘 가지고 놀아용! 삑삑이 장난감중에 최애 픽 !❤️
reviews.content_en: My pup started playing with it right away! It's my top pick among squeaky toys! ❤️

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content: 솜인형 장난감들을 다 찢어서 라텍스류로 바꿔줬어요! 삑삑 소리도 지나치게 크지 않고 적당해서 좋아요! 8kg믹스견 강아지가 실컷 물어도 찢어지지 않아서 더 좋습니다! 혹여나 찢어서 잔여물 먹을까봐 걱정 많이했는데 이제는 그냥 물고 놀게 둬요 ㅎㅎ.. 너무너무 귀엽고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: We replaced all the plush toys since he kept tearing them up, so we switched to latex! The squeaky sound isn't too loud—it's just right. And the best part is our 8kg mixed breed can chew on it without tearing it, so I don't have to worry about him swallowing pieces anymore haha.. It's so cute and I love it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 라텍스 공을 너무 좋아해서 하도 가지고 놀다보니 다 헤져가지구 새로운 장난감을 찾다가 발견했어요 튼튼하고 마감이 좋으네요! 저희 강쥐도 한입에 쏙 물기 좋은 사이즈라 아주 맘에 들어합니당
reviews.content_en: My dog loved the latex ball so much that it eventually got all worn out, so I went looking for a new toy and found this! It's really durable and the finish is great! Our pup loves the size too—perfect for a one-bite grab. We're very happy with it!

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 최애 장난감이 되어버렸어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 물고 여기저기 다니면서 삑삑거리는데 등교 준비하는 아들램 같기도... 계속 이거로 놀아달라고 물고오네요 귀여워여
reviews.content_en: It became his favorite toy lol He carries it around squeaking and it reminds me of my son getting ready for school... He keeps bringing it back begging to play with it. So cute!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
울집 아들래미 진짜 잘 가지고놀아요 
소리나니까 더 좋나하네요 냄새가 마니나지않아서 더 좋으네요
reviews.content_en: My boy really loves playing with it! The sound makes it even better, and it doesn't have a strong smell which is great!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
눈빛만큼은 야수멈머~ 잘 가지고 놀아요^^
역시 강아지가 좋아하는 소재🐶♥️
에그토스트 퀄리티 므엇! 🫶🏽
사이즈 너무 안크고 적당하고 예뻐요~
reviews.content_en: He's got that wild look in his eyes when he plays~ He really enjoys it 🐶♥️ The EGGTOSS quality is unreal! 🫶🏽 The size isn't too big, it's just right, and it looks adorable~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
라텍스장난감은 여기서만 사용💛
아주아주 귀엽고 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I only buy latex toys here 💛 It's absolutely adorable and I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 아가가 엄청 좋아해요 라텍스라 안전할거 같고 좋네요
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much! Since it's latex, it feels safe too!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 애기가 너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 처음에 올 땐 약간 쪼끄만 한 이물질 같은 아이들이 붙어있었어요! 닦고 애기랑 놀아줬습니다 😻 지금까지 사준 장난감들 중에 저걸 제일 마음에 들어하는 것 같아요! 초콜릿 같은 달달한 향도 나고 애기가 저렇게 통통 튀는 라텍스 장난감을 좋아해서 너무 너무 잘 산 것 같아요 :) 망가지면 또 구매 하러 오겠습니다 😎
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much hahahaha When it first arrived, there were some small particles stuck to it, but I cleaned it off before playing with him 😻 Out of all the toys I've bought so far, this seems to be his favorite! It has a sweet chocolate-like scent and he loves bouncy latex toys like this, so I feel like I made such a great purchase! I'll definitely come back to buy more if it gets damaged 😎

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content:
바잇미 장난감은 너무 좋은게 백발백중 댕댕이 취향이에요

실패없는 장난감인데다가 모양도 얼마나 귀여운지❤️

댕댕이도 견주도 너무 만족스러워요!

삑삑이 소리도 오래가도 너무 좋아용
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toys are seriously a hit! 🎉 My pup absolutely loves them, and the design is SO cute ❤️ Both my dog and I are super satisfied! The squeaky sound lasts forever too, which is awesome!

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 애견카페에서 잘 가지고 놀길래 구매했는데 최애 장난감 등극❤️
reviews.content_en: I saw my friend's pup playing with it at the dog café and decided to get one—now it's my dog's favorite toy ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 벌써 세번째 구매 중인 장난감이에요! 금방 찢어지진 않을까 걱정했는데 엄청 튼튼해요! 저희 집 애가 파괴왕이라 3~4개월에 한번씩 바꿔주고 있어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: This is my third purchase of this toy! I was worried it might tear easily, but it's super durable! My pup is a total destruction machine, so I replace it every 3-4 months lol 😂

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아이기 너무 잘 가지고 ㅇ놀아요. 삑삑 소리내면서 하루종일 갖고 노내요. 잘때도 침내에 두고 자요~
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves playing with it. It squeaks and she carries it around all day long. She even takes it to bed with her when she sleeps! 🐕

reviews.name: g****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지 최애 장난감이예요!! 다른 라텍스 장남감은 하루만에 뜯기는데 이건 몇달갑니다.튼튼해요
reviews.content_en: This is my pup's favorite toy!! Other latex toys get destroyed in just one day, but this one lasts for months. It's really tough!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 원래 사료로 꼬시면 무슨 장난감이든 내려놓는데 안뺏기려는 저 손 좀 보세요.. 진짜 후라이인줄 알겠어요😂😂 간만에 제대로 된 라텍스 장난감 잘 샀네요😀
reviews.content_en: Usually my dog drops any toy the moment I dangle food in front of her, but look at that grip! 😂😂 She really thinks it's a fry or something. I'm so glad I found a quality latex toy like this one! 😀

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바잇미 라텍스 장난감이 튼튼하구 예뻐서 좋은거 같아요!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME latex toys seem great—they're durable and pretty! 💕

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content:
인형장난감은 많은데 라텍스재질도 필요할것같아서 하나 사줬어요. 역시나 좋아하네요. 리뷰보니까 물세척하면 구멍에 물이들어가서 소리가 잘 안난다길래 소독스프레이 뿌려서 쥐어줬어요.
아, 다 좋은데 택이 안쪽에 달려있어서 깨끗하게 뺄수가 없었네요.
말로 설명하기 어려운데ㅎ 암튼요 가위로 바짝 잘라주긴 했는데 택을 왜 그렇게 다셨는지... ㅜㅜ
먼지가 좀 잘붙어서 물티슈로 닦아주는게 좀 귀찮긴 하지만 내새꾸 잘 가지고놀아서 이정도 귀찮음은 감수하려구요.
더 예쁜 장난감 많이 만들어주세요!!
reviews.content_en: I have lots of plush toys, but I felt like I needed a latex one too, so I got one. My pup loves it as expected! I read in reviews that water can get stuck in the squeaker if you wash it, so I just spray it with disinfectant instead. Oh, one thing though—the tag is attached on the inside, so I couldn't remove it cleanly. 😅 It's hard to explain, but yeah, I had to cut it off with scissors. Not sure why they attached the tag that way... 😭 Also, it picks up dust pretty easily, so I have to wipe it with a wet wipe sometimes, which is a bit annoying. But since my pup loves playing with it so much, I can deal with the hassle! Please make more cute designs! 💕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 얇아서 사봤어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Bought it because it's cute and thin! 🙂

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 그것은 내 작은 종의 강아지에게 너무 귀엽고 적합해!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and perfect for my small breed dog!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 일단 제품 자체는 생각했던 그대로이고 열었을 때 향기가 나는데 맛있고 달달한 향이나서 먹고싶은 느낌이었어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그리고 보들보들? 한 느낌이어서 강아지가 가지고 놀기에도 안심되는 재질이었습니다! 그런데 너무 슬프게도 저희 강아지는 삑삑 소리를 무서워 하더라구요ㅜㅜ 너무 애기라 한번도 삑소리나는 장난감을 사용해보지 않아 몰랐는데 무서워하고 으르렁거리고 처음으로 짖어대고 난리여서 나중에 더 크면 쓰던지 아니면 다른 친구네 주던지 할 거 같아여ㅜㅜㅜ 그래도 제품 자체는 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en: The product itself is exactly what I expected, and when I opened it, there was a pleasant sweet smell that made me want to eat it lol 😂 Plus it had a soft, fluffy feel, so it was a reassuring material for my puppy to play with! But sadly, my pup is scared of squeaky sounds 😭😭 Since he's still so young and has never tried a squeaky toy before, I didn't know he'd be afraid. He growled, barked, and made a fuss for the first time, so I'll probably use it when he gets older or give it to a friend's dog later 😭😭😭 Still, the product itself is great!

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 그것은 우리 강아지에게 너무 귀엽고 적합해!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and perfect for our puppy! 🐶

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 근데 땅에 붙어있을땐 아이가 못물고와요 너무 납작하고 커서 그런가..그것만빼면 하루종일 물고있고 너무 좋아해용
reviews.content_en: I love it so much! But when it's on the ground, my pup can't grab it and bring it to me since it's so flat and big... other than that, he chews on it all day long and loves it so much! 💕

reviews.name: 영****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운 식빵 강쥐장남감
reviews.content_en: Such a cute toast-shaped puppy toy! 🍞

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워요 아주좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! I really love it! 🥰

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
생일 선물로 사줬어요^^ 

에그토스트 너무 좋아해서 망고가 이름도 외웠어요

에그토스트 가져오라면 물고 오지용^^

내구성도 탄탄하고 삑삑이 소리도 적당하고 만족해요
reviews.content_en:
Got it as a birthday gift! ^^ 
Mango loves the egg toast toy so much that he even learned the name!
If I say 'bring the egg toast,' he grabs it and brings it over ^^
It's durable and has the perfect squeaky sound - I'm very satisfied! 👍

reviews.name: 기****
reviews.content: 오자마자 뜯어서 줬는데 며칠전에도 장난감 사줬는데 그건 쳐다보지도 않네욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 확실히 삑삑이를 더 좋아하나봅니다.. 삑삑이 소리가 평소 가지고 놀던 것보다 소리가 작아서 마음에 들고요 물고 있는 모습이 진짜로 토스트 물고 있는 것 같아서 너무 귀엽네요 한가지 아쉬운건 바닥에 붙어있음 얘가 물질 못해서 꼭 계란 있는 쪽이 바닥으로 향하게 돌려줘야한다는 점이 있긴 해요 더 가지고 놀면 적응 하겠죠~!
reviews.content_en: I gave it to him as soon as it arrived, and I got him another toy a few days ago but he doesn't even look at it lol 😂😂😂😂😂 He definitely prefers the squeaky toy... I like that the squeaky sound is quieter than his other toys, and the way he chews on it looks just like he's actually biting a piece of toast - it's so cute! 🐶 One small downside is that when it sticks to the ground, he can't grab it, so I have to flip it over so the egg side faces up. But he'll probably adapt the more he plays with it! ~

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
라텍스라 헤지거나 구멍날 일 없어서 좋아요
먼지가 잘 붙고 던지면 좀 둔탁하다는 단점이 있지만
귀엽게 생겼고
삑삑소리 때문에 아이도 좋아하구 잘 노네요
reviews.content_en:
I like that it's made of latex so it won't tear or get holes 💪
It does collect dust easily and makes a dull sound when you throw it, which is a downside,
but it looks cute 🐕
and my pup loves it because of the squeaky sound and plays with it well! 🎾

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 솜이 들어있는건 받자마자 파괴!! 해버려서 라텍스 장난감 구경하다가 구입했는데!!! 너무 좋아합니다ㅠㅠ 삑삑 소리도 크지않고 적당하고 크기도 딱 물기 좋네요! 요즘 맨날 물고와서 놀아달라고 합니다 ㅋㅋㅋ 찢어지지도 않고 최고에요
reviews.content_en: My pup who destroys anything with stuffing demolished that toy right away!! So I looked into latex toys and bought this one!!! I love it so much 😭😭 The squeaky sound isn't too loud - it's just right, and the size is perfect for chewing! These days he's always carrying it around and wanting me to play with him 😂 It doesn't tear at all - it's the best! ⭐

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 처음으로 바잇미에서 장난감을 시켜봤는데 저희집 갱얼지가 너무 좋아해요 라텍스 장난감은 처음인데 너무 잘가지고 놀아용 아가라서 처음에 들고다닐때 좀 무거워했어요 지금은 잘 가지고 다니네요 디자인도 맘에 드는 귀여운 장난감^^
reviews.content_en: This is my first time ordering a toy from BITE ME, and my puppy absolutely loves it! 🐶 It's my first latex toy too, and he plays with it so well! Since he's still a baby, it was a bit heavy for him to carry around at first, but now he carries it around just fine! I love the design too - such a cute toy! 😊

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 취향저격에 성공했어요 빨리 내놔라고 후힝힝거려요 혼자도 잘 놀다가 한번씩 던지라고 물고 와서 얼굴에 들이대요
reviews.content_en: It's a total hit! 🐕 She keeps whining for me to throw it. She plays with it alone, and sometimes brings it back to me to throw again, shoving it in my face.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: ㅎㅎㅎ 저희 애기는 삑삑이를 엄청 좋아해서 주기별로 새로 사주는편인데, 여태 사던것들 보다 왠지 더 안전한 소재인거 같아요~ 애기도 하루종일 물고 장난으로 뺏으려하면 으르렁거리네요 ㅋㅋㅋ담에 또 살게요~~
reviews.content_en: Haha, our baby absolutely loves squeaky toys, so we buy new ones regularly. This one seems like it's made of safer material than the ones we've bought before~ Baby plays with it all day and growls when we try to take it away as a joke lol. We'll definitely buy it again~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
넘 좋아합니다
하루 종일 삑삑거리면서 물고다녀요
쫌 시끄럽긴하지만 넘 좋아하니...ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: She absolutely loves it 💕 She carries it around squeaking all day long. It's a bit loud, but since she loves it so much... lol

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content:
앞으로 옷은 여기서 구매 해야겠어용
2.2키로 말티푸 s사이즈 딱 좋아용 !
다른 곳은 작거나 아니면 m입혀야 될때도 많았는데
여긴 그게 아닌 것 같아서 좋았어요 !
reviews.content_en: I'll definitely be buying clothes from here from now on! 👕 My 2.2kg Maltipoo fits perfectly in the S size! Other places either run small or I have to buy M size, but that's not an issue here - really happy about that!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 조금 크긴한데 일단 귀여움
reviews.content_en: It's a bit big, but it's so cute 🥰

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 공원에서 만난 친구 장난감을 너무 좋아해서 같은걸로 주문했습니다! 열자마자 자기꺼라고 들고가서 엄청 가지고 노는데 대만족이에요~
reviews.content_en: My friend's dog at the park loved this toy so much that I ordered the same one! As soon as we opened it, my pup claimed it as his own and has been playing with it constantly - couldn't be happier~ 🐾

reviews.name: o****
reviews.content: 좀 클 것 같다고 생각했는데 아이 입에 잘 맞아요! 앞발로 잡아서 놀기도 하고 물고 다니기도 해요. 노는 강아지도 보는 사람도 즐거운 귀여운 장난감입니다😳
reviews.content_en: I thought it might be too big, but it fits perfectly in my pup's mouth! He grabs it with his front paws to play and carries it around. It's such a cute toy that both the dog playing and the people watching are having a blast! 😳

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 아직 너무 아기라 잘 갖고 놀진 못하는데 한번씩 궁금해합니다 ㅎㅎ 디자인이 귀여워서 강아지보다 제가 더 맘에 드네요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: He's still so young that he doesn't really play with it much yet, but he's curious about it sometimes haha. The design is so adorable that I actually love it more than he does lol

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 삑삑소리나는거 좋아햐서 구입햇는데 귀엽고 좋아하네여 ㅎㅎ 근데 네모모양이여서 살짝 물기를 어려워하능것같아영
reviews.content_en: I bought it because he likes squeaky sounds, and it's cute and he loves it! But since it's square-shaped, it seems a bit hard for him to bite onto 😅

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 배송 받자마자 씻어서 줬는데 울애기 새장난감은 늘 좋아해요! 바잇미 장난감은 귀여워서 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 💕 I washed it as soon as it arrived and gave it to her. She always loves new toys! BITE ME toys are really cute so I love them too^^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 삑삑이를좋아해서 한개더구매했어요.오자마자 줬더니 잘가지고노네요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves the squeaky toy, so I bought another one. She started playing with it right away!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑 소리가 잘나는데 크지않아서 좋아요
근데 저희 강아지는 잘 물어오진 못하고 먼지도 생각보다 잘붙는거같은데 세척하기도 쉬워서 괜찮아요!
reviews.content_en: The squeaky sound comes through well and it's not too loud, which is great! My dog doesn't fetch it, but dust does stick to it more than expected. The good thing is it's really easy to clean!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 잘 가지고 놀고 식빵 앙 하고 물고 있는 것 같아서 귀여워요^^ 라텍스라 보들보들 해서 그런가 처음에는 납작한 장난감이라 요리조리 해보는것도 좋은 것 같아요 그리고 탄성이 있어서 던지면 통통 튀니까 재밌어하더라구요 또 구매하러 왔어요^^ 일주일도 안됐는데 이미 삑삑 소리가 안나거든요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: She loves playing with it so much, and it's so cute watching her hold it in her mouth like toast 😊 Since it's latex, it's soft and squishy. At first it's a flat toy so it's fun to play with it different ways. And since it has good elasticity, it bounces when you throw it, which she enjoys! I came back to buy it again 😊 But the squeaky sound already stopped after less than a week ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
받자마자 뾱뾱 소리내주니까 관심가지더니
잘가지고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ 장난감도 너무 귀여워요 
사실 제가 보기에 너무 귀여워서 산것두 있어요😆♥
reviews.content_en: As soon as it arrived, it made a squeaky sound so she got interested and plays with it well ㅋㅋ The toy itself is so cute too! Honestly, I bought it partly because I think it's so adorable 😆♥

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 귀여운데 저희애가 좋아하진않네요 ㅠㅠ 한번씩 발로 누르긴해요 생긴곤 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's cute but my dog doesn't really like it ㅠㅠ She does press it with her paw once in a while. It's so adorable looking though!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 라텍스애그토스트인데 고무질감이 부드럽고 좋네요 삑삑소리도 나고 물기도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's a latex egg toast and the rubber texture is soft and nice. It makes a squeaky sound and she loves chewing on it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 정말좋아해요 이것만 가지고놀아요
reviews.content_en: She really loves it! She only plays with this one.

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
바잇미 시리즈 3개 사서 이걸 제일 먼저줬는데 굵기가 얇아서 빠다개코낫이나 아이스크림보다 빨리 망가졌어요.하루만에 저렇게 되버렸지만 ㅠㅠ 그만큼 준지 몇시간 안됐는데 저것만 물고 앙앙거리면서 종일 삑삑댔습니다.ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ

5.5kg인데 더 작은 소형견들이 물고 놀기에 좋을것같아요.
reviews.content_en: I bought 3 BITE ME series toys and gave her this one first. Since it's thinner, it broke faster than the Paw Opener or Ice Cream toys. It fell apart after just one day ㅠㅠ but even though I'd only given it to her a few hours before, she wouldn't stop chewing on it and squeaking it all day haha. She's 5.5kg but I think it would be especially good for smaller dogs to play with.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 아주 잘 가지고 놀아요!!
reviews.content_en: She plays with it really well!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송 받자마자 신이났어요~ㅋㅋ
타 제품대비 튼튼하고  좋네요
reviews.content_en: She was so excited as soon as I got the delivery! It's sturdier and better compared to other products 😊
